header.subtitle: Choose a model, mode, and toolset for documents, web, and work data.

general.label: General assistant
general.description: Direct chat with AI — no documents or tools

auto.label: Auto
auto.description: Let the assistant combine internal docs and web

auto.label: Auto tools
auto.description: Allow the full toolset when needed

none.label: No tools
none.description: Do not call project or ticket tools

documents.label: Documents
documents.description: Only document tree and list tools

organization.label: Organization
organization.description: Only organization profile and member tools

emptyState.title: How can I help you today?

suggestions.auto1: Compare our internal policy with current best practices
suggestions.auto2: Find internal docs and recent web sources about this topic
suggestions.auto3: Use the right tool to check my work data
suggestions.rag2: What are the key points in the HR policy?
suggestions.rag3: Find information about the product roadmap
suggestions.web1: What are the latest AI news?

input.warning: AI answers may be wrong. Verify with primary sources.

capabilityPopover.title: Choose active tools
capabilityPopover.description: Turn internal and external capabilities on together, then apply once.
capabilityPopover.internalDescription: Use document search or internal work tools.

internalDialog.title: Configure Internal Tool
internalDialog.description: Reuse the existing internal search or internal tool settings for this conversation.

externalConfig.title: Configure External Tool
externalConfig.description: Choose how the assistant can reach outside sources for this conversation.

configDialog.title: Choose chat mode
configDialog.description: Pick one of 3 modes. Only the selected mode is activated.
configDialog.toolsetCategoryDesc: Let AI use tools like tasks, tickets, projects...
configDialog.scopeRequiredHint: This is required when scope is Project / Folder / Document.
configDialog.scopeOptionsError: Failed to load data from documents module
configDialog.scopeIdRequired: Please select one item from the list

sidebar.title: Conversations
sidebar.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. All messages in this conversation will be permanently deleted.

pendingAction.title: Confirmation required before execution
pendingAction.requiresConfirmation: I have prepared this action. Confirm it and I will continue.
pendingAction.cancelledDescription: This pending confirmation request has been cancelled.
